name: Sprout
description: Seedlings unfurling their first pair of leaves — every redraw catches germination at a different moment.

code.style: --rule: ( /* both seed leaves unfurl by one emitted angle and share a tone */ --leafA: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color4)); --germ: @r(0, 26); --soil: @r(20, 40); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 19%; bottom: 26%; width: 31%; height: 42%; background: @var(--leafA); clip-path: @shape(drop); transform: rotate(calc(-24deg - @var(--germ) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 100% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; bottom: 26%; width: 31%; height: 42%; background: @var(--leafA); clip-path: @shape(drop); transform: rotate(calc(24deg + @var(--germ) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 0% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } } @random(0.5) { background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 100%, var(--color3) 0 calc(@var(--soil) * 1%), transparent calc(@var(--soil) * 1% + 1%)); } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
